content:
# session_5 summary (iter-005, first real prover round)

## Metadata
- Iter/session: 005. Model: claude-opus-4-8. Stage: prover (3 lanes).
- Decl-level sorry: net **−2** declarations fully closed (`grassmannian_cocycle`,
  `descent_of_subschemes`). Per-file (decl-warns): Functors 17→16, QuotConstruction 8→8
  (real proof code added around 1 isolated gap), Variants 11→10.
- First iter where prover proved bodies (iters 2–4 were scaffold). 0 `axiom`; all 3
  files build green (sorry-warnings only). lean_verify on closed decls: only
  `propext / Classical.choice / Quot.sound`.

## Lane 1 — Functors.lean (mathlib-build: grassmannianScheme)
**`grassmannian_cocycle` — SOLVED (axiom-clean).** Pivot from the assigned
`grassmannianScheme` BUILD to the one fully-provable target.
- Content: matrix cocycle `⅟M_K·M = ⅟((⅟M_J·M)_K)·(⅟M_J·M)` + an embedded instance
  obligation `Invertible M_K` written `haveI := by sorry` **inside the type**.
- Key fact `hcol`: `(⅟M_J·M).submatrix id K = ⅟M_J·(M.submatrix id K)` —
  `submatrix _root_.id K` reindexes columns only, commutes past `⅟M_J`. Proof:
  `ext i j; simp [Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.submatrix_apply]`.
- `Invertible M_K`: `M_K = M_J·(⅟M_J·M)_K` (`←Matrix.mul_assoc, mul_invOf_self,
  Matrix.one_mul`) ⟹ `invertibleMul _ _`.
- **Gotcha (recorded as pattern):** the type's baked `Invertible M_K` instance is NOT
  in local ctx; a freshly-built one is structurally distinct, so `exact h` →
  `Type mismatch` on `Invertible.invOf … this`. `Invertible` is `Subsingleton`, so
  finishing with **`convert h using 3`** discharges the instance subterm cleanly.
  Canonical fix for planner-written `haveI := by sorry`-in-statement obligations.

**`grassmannianScheme` (line 263) — NOT attempted (correct).** A `Scheme.GlueData`
assembly: its data fields (`U,V,f,t`) are Scheme/morphism-valued, so a `sorry`-in-data
skeleton ships junk schemes (banned weaken-type pattern), strictly worse than the clean
typed `sorry`. Prover handed off a concrete **6-step decomposition** (charts
`Fin d ↪ Fin r`; frame matrix `X^I` over `MvPolynomial`; `U^I = Spec`; overlaps
`D(P^I_J)` with `P^I_J = det (X^I).submatrix id J`; transition maps `θ` whose cocycle
is exactly the now-proven lemma; assemble `GlueData.glued`) — see
`task_results/Functors.lean.md`.

## Lane 2 — QuotConstruction.lean (`quot_properness` 2nd conjunct)
**PARTIAL — reduced to one isolated, genuine gap.** First conjunct `IsProper Q.hom`
already via `valuativeCriterion_proper`. Second conjunct (`IsImmersion i → … →
IsClosedImmersion i`) now a full tactic proof: `IsProper.of_comp` (proper cancellation)
→ `IsProper.toUniversallyClosed` → `Scheme.Hom.isClosedMap` →
`IsClosedMap.isClosed_range` → `IsImmersion.toIsPreimmersion` →
`IsClosedImmersion.of_isPreimmersion`. Everything compiles **except** the single
instance `haveI hsep : IsSeparated (relativeProj.structureMorphism S F) := sorry`.
- Dead end: `IsProper.of_comp_of_isSeparated` (surfaced by leansearch) **does not
  exist**; only `IsProper.of_comp` (with `[IsSeparated g]` hyp) is real.
- **The gap is genuine, not difficulty.** `relativeProj`/`.structureMorphism` are
  `sorryAx`-valued EGA-III stubs in `Basic.lean`; no nontrivial property of an opaque
  stub is provable without an axiom. Separatedness is load-bearing (a non-separated `p`
  admits a proper composite with merely locally-closed image), so it can't be routed
  around. **⟹ planner's "reachable, no EGA-III needed" tag was wrong.** Falls out for
  free once `relativeProj` is BUILT.

## Lane 3 — Variants.lean (import-wire + flatness + descent)
- **(a) Import wiring DONE:** added `import …QuotConstruction`; builds green.
- **`flatness_local_criterion` — PARTIAL.**
  - **Signature change (faithful):** added `[IsLocallyNoetherian X]` to both conjuncts.
    Blueprint `lem:flatness-local-criterion` + Nitsure source both say "noetherian
    schemes"; the autoformalized statement had dropped it. Required for part(1) to be
    true (flat+finite-type open needs finite *presentation*, which over noetherian
    follows from finite type). `\lean{…}` pin unchanged; non-protected leaf decl.
  - Part(1) RESOLVED: `LocallyOfFiniteType + IsLocallyNoetherian ⟹
    LocallyOfFinitePresentation` (Mathlib instance) → `UniversallyOpen.of_flat` →
    `Scheme.Hom.isOpenMap`.
  - Part(2) OPEN: `IsOpen {y | RingHom.Flat (f.stalkMap y).hom}` = **EGA IV 11.1.1 /
    11.3.1, absent from Mathlib** (only `Algebra.isOpen_smoothLocus` and
    `Module.freeLocus` exist; neither covers the stalk-map flat locus). Memo written to
    `informal/flatness_local_criterion_flat_locus.md`. No informal-agent key present.
- **`descent_of_subschemes` — SOLVED, both parts, axiom-clean.**
  - Part(1) ffqc⟹IsColimit kernel-pair cofork: `Surjective f := ⟨hf⟩`; Fpqc instance
    `EffectiveEpi f` (from QC+Surj+Flat); `isColimitCoforkOfEffectiveEpi f _
    (pullback.isLimit f f)`.
  - Part(2) — **planner had tagged "gap-blocked, do not attempt"; prover found a clean
    topological route.** Set-level descent is NOT EGA-blocked (only the scheme-structure
    ideal-sheaf descent is). `Q := p''Z`; `Flat.isQuotientMap_of_surjective` +
    `Topology.isQuotientMap_iff_isClosed` (closed ↔ preimage closed) +
    `Scheme.Pullback.exists_preimage_pullback` (pullback carrier surjects onto
    set-theoretic fibre product, turning `p₁⁻¹Z=p₂⁻¹Z` into saturation `p⁻¹(p''Z)=Z`) +
    `Set.image_preimage_eq` (uniqueness). Gotcha: name needs `Scheme.Pullback.` prefix;
    `show` → use `change`.

## Key findings / patterns
- **`convert h using N` for haveI-in-statement** (subsingleton instance mismatch) — new.
- **Set-level vs scheme-structure descent split**: the topological shadow of fppf
  descent is provable now via quotient-map + pullback-carrier surjectivity; only the
  ideal-sheaf descent (`thm:ffdescent`) stays gapped. Don't conflate.
- **Two planner gap-tags were wrong this iter** (opposite directions):
  `quot_properness` 2nd conjunct was tagged reachable but IS gap-blocked (relativeProj
  separatedness); `descent_of_subschemes` part(2) was tagged gap-blocked but was
  reachable. Net: gap-status must be probed per-statement, not inherited.

## Recommendations (next session)
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: the loop is now **fully gated on the EGA-III §7
BUILD** — `frontier=0`, every remaining sorry is foundational-layer-blocked except the
`grassmannianScheme` GlueData BUILD (axiom-independent, ready to start with the cocycle
lemma in hand). No structural blueprint issues (doctor clean; dag gaps/unmatched/frontier all 0).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Functors.tex`, `lem:grassmannian-cocycle`: added `\leanok` to the **proof block**
  (manual override). Justification: prover closed both sorries (the embedded
  `Invertible` obligation + the matrix equation); body lines 282–342 are sorry-free
  (verified by grep + the prover's `lean_verify` → only standard axioms). The
  `sync_leanok` run (iter=5) did **not** touch `Functors.tex` at all — it added 4
  markers only in `QuotConstruction.tex`/`Variants.tex` — so this complete proof was
  missed. Override is safe and certain.

No `\mathlibok` added (no pure Mathlib re-export among closed decls — both are genuine
proofs). No `\lean{…}` renames (all names unchanged, incl. `flatness_local_criterion`
despite its signature change). No stale `\notready` (none present project-wide).
No `% NOTE` needed for the `[IsLocallyNoetherian X]` addition — the blueprint prose +
source already state "noetherian schemes", so the Lean now *matches* the blueprint
rather than diverging.
